modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Automatic Machine Captions enabled for new Panopto recordings

full_description_text:  
The user has noticed that all new recordings in Panopto are now automatically receiving machine-generated captions. This change in functionality may affect how captions are displayed and utilized in their workflow. The technician is seeking clarification on this new setting and its implications for future recordings.
